name: Rice Omelet I.e.s.jjgf65a
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, blend the cooked rice, grated cheese, and cubed pepperoni using a fork.
2. Beat the eggs in a separate bowl until the whites and yolks are well mixed; season lightly with salt and pepper.
3. Heat a large frying pan or omelet pan over medium-high heat and melt the butter, ensuring the entire bottom of the pan is coated.
4. Pour the beaten eggs into the pan and cook, lifting the cooked portions to allow the uncooked parts to flow underneath and shaking the pan when the bottom starts to set.
5. While the top is still moist, spoon the rice filling down the center of the omelet.
6. Fold over the omelet and cook just long enough to heat the filling and melt the cheese. Alternatively, prepare individual omelets using 2 or 3 eggs per person, dividing the filling among each omelet.
7. Makes 3 to 4 servings.
